properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was a dry bone in the valley, When Jesus found me; A dry bone in the valley, When He put flesh upon me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Said, “Son of Man, can these dry bones live? ” And I answered, “Oh Lord, Thou knowest. ”

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You have given us prophetic eyes, So we won’t believe Satan’s lies; Although the world thinks us absurd, We’ll keep on holding to Your Word.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are the flowers and You are life’s essence, May Oh Lord, You have the pre- eminence; For that’s the reason why You made us, To achieve Your greatest purpose.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Now I stand justified and do appreciate The out-pouring of Your wonderful grace; Sanctified from the bondage of sin, As the Holy Spirit now dwells within.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now I’m no longer a dry bone in the valley, Since Jesus set me free; And now I’m growing in His Grace, And some day soon I’ll see His face.
